mapper.sql: p.id, p.park_id, p.name, p.code, p.address, p.area, p.total_rooms, p.parking_fee, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.rent_min, p.rent_max, p.rent_unit, p.region, p.detail_address, p.thumbnail_url, p.banner_url, p.summary, p.supporting_services, p.traffic_info, p.content, p.contact_name, p.contact_phone, p.status, p.memo, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(area) FROM ics_floor park_id = #{parkId}), 0) AS managementArea, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(area) FROM ics_room park_id = #{parkId} AND status = '0'), 0) AS rentableArea, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ics_room park_id = #{parkId}), 0) AS totalRoomCount, COALESCE((SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ics_room park_id = #{parkId} AND status = '0'), 0) AS rentableRoomCount
